title: meibomia lupulina
intro: Meibomia lupulina, also known as butterfly weed or monk's hood, is a plant species in the milkweed family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and promoting wound healing. Meibomia lupulina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal uses.
